sentences.text: Hey, hunter, how are you doing.
Evan reached out and has to reschedule.
So I'm not sure if you and I just wanna have the call today.
or what are your what are your thoughts on that.
I think we should wait for him.
And you know, honestly, he's I mean he's the guy in charge of our market research, you know.
Like I, I'm I'm curious to see what new things you guys have, and whether or not it's accretive for us.
Then to make that, to make think about making a change for him like he's never seen it.
So I think we need to have him in the room.
I would go ahead and reschedule.
Alright, yeah, fair enough, I will.
And I'll get that calendar invite updated once.
